text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A short while earlier, at the URA awards
ceremony...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove has been chosen to be the URA's
Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The title is a prestigious one presented by the
URA to the best performing racer in that year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Air Groove has helped us on more than one
occasion, we decide to attend the award
ceremony in support.

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
Now then, let's hear from the Umamusume of the
Year, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Thank you all for selecting me for this unexpected
honor.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I will always endeavor to live up to your
expectations while bearing the honor of being
this generation's representative.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I hope you will lend your support to me and my
wonderful and worthy competitors in the races of
this year's Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove was so amazing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's really no wonder why Air Groove is known as
the Empress. Her speech made me realize anew
just how incredible her presence is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
This all reminds me of the time McQueen was
selected as the senior-year Goddess...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: She was so stately and dignified...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
McQueen was the literal epitome and
embodiment of a Mejiro legacy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: And Air Groove is just like her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Their dignity and strength are surely what make
them true representatives of their generations!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But Air Groove is more than that to me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
She's someone who never stops seeking new
challenges and pushing herself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Even during the Japanese Oaks, she was the ideal
that guided me along.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to follow in Air Groove's
footsteps.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If I walk the path she walked and reach the
heights she reached... Maybe if I become like
her...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Then I can forge a new Mejiro legacy!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I want to continue the legacy Ramonu left
behind...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, I feel a fleeting sense of discomfort
spread through my chest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But before I can even try to figure out what it is,
Mejiro Dober addresses me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Do you think she'll race in the next Osaka Hai?
She will, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Okay... I'll show Air Groove just how much closer
I've gotten to my ideal at the Osaka Hai, then!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm not going to hold anything back in that race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Dober's motivation is through the roof.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to tell myself there's nothing to worry about,
but I'm not quite convinced...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I'm still falling short. I must push myself
even farther...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bright! You're still going?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Good evening, Ryan! Such a pleasant night, no?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. I'm the leisurely sort, so I was taking my
time through each exercise. I didn't even realize
how late it'd gotten until now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hey, why don't you take a break? I wanna talk to
you for a bit.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Gulp, gulp... Ah! That was refreshing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Thank you for the drink, Ryan. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: It's nothing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm glad I got you something to drink now...
but have you been staying hydrated? Eating
properly?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, yes, of course. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You're awfully concerned about me today,
aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh... It's just...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
During my classic year, I always fell short in my
races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So I just... How do I put this? I was just wondering
if you might be feeling pressured or—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The day after the Arima Kinen, I was watching a
feature on TV that spotlighted classic racers.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
They didn't talk about Dober and me at all...
Instead, they focused on the accomplishments of
you and other great Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure why they didn't mention Dober, but I
thought it made perfect sense that they didn't
bring me up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I placed fourth at the Satsuki Sho and third at the
Japanese Derby and Kikuka Sho. I wasn't even
able to participate in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
My results weren't anything to be ashamed of, but
they weren't exactly great accomplishments
either. They were never quite enough.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
On the other hand, Dober performed splendidly
in the Triple Tiara tour and was even selected to
race in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We both vowed that we would walk the difficult
path of forging new legacies for the Mejiro
family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
But Dober is the only one who is actually making
any progress.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ryan, I've decided to run in the spring Tenno Sho
next.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I want to be the one to grant the Mejiros' wish...
No, not just that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I want to claim that glorious spring plaque with a
performance brilliant enough to exceed every
past Mejiro achievement.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: That's why I have no choice but to push myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I know I'm not strong enough to conquer the
3,200-meter run nor the Yodo slope, but I need
to be if I want that plaque.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You know, Ryan...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I love the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I love our long history, our great accolades, the
expectations that come with our name, and
everyone who is crowned with the same name.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That's the reason why I want to carry this honor
and forge a new legacy alongside Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh... I had no idea...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry! I had forgotten what it was like.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
After my own disappointing performance in the
Classics, I didn't want anyone to tell me to take it
easy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I wanted people to cheer me on! I wanted them to
say that they hoped to see me win the next time I
tried!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: So... I'm going to say that to you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Win, Bright. I'm expecting a lot from you in your
future!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh my, Ryan! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much. I'll keep your words forever
carved into my heart.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Good to hear! I'll get out of your way now! I'm
going to head back first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Go get 'em, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I'll be sure to win, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I will claim a new, glorious victory for the Mejiro
name.
